description: Observability with real OpenTelemetry SDK. The existing packages/observability/ has in-house implementations of tracing/metrics/logging (DistributedTracer, MetricsCollector, StructuredLogger). Wave 4 adds: real @opentelemetry/* SDK packages with OTLP exporter, a proper initTracing() function that is opt-in (only activates when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set), a server-core plugin that registers OTel Fastify instrumentation, and Jaeger/Prometheus/Grafana in docker-compose.
steps: Create packages/observability/src/sdk/tracing.ts - initTracing(serviceName) function that sets up NodeSDK with OtlpTraceExporter. Must be opt-in: if OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is not set, return a no-op. Export shutdown function.

Create packages/observability/src/sdk/metrics.ts - initMetrics(serviceName) function that sets up OTLP metrics exporter with custom metrics: http_request_count (Counter), http_request_duration_seconds (Histogram), http_error_total (Counter). Opt-in same as tracing.

Create packages/observability/src/sdk/logger.ts - createLogger(serviceName) that creates a pino logger instance with trace_id/span_id injection from active OTel context. Falls back to plain pino when OTel is not initialized.
Create packages/observability/src/sdk/index.ts - barrel export of initTracing, initMetrics, createLogger
Update packages/observability/src/index.ts to re-export from ./sdk/index (add at the end, don't remove existing exports)

Create packages/server-core/src/plugins/observability.ts - Fastify plugin that: calls initTracing on register, adds onRequest hook to create spans, adds onResponse hook to record duration metric, propagates trace context via headers. Registers only if OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set.
Export the observability plugin from packages/server-core/src/index.ts

Add Jaeger (jaegertracing/all-in-one:latest, ports 16686/4318), Prometheus (prom/prometheus:latest, port 9090, mount config), and Grafana (grafana/grafana:latest, port 3200) to docker-compose.yml. All on quant-network.
Create docker/prometheus/prometheus.yml with scrape config targeting the app services
Add OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var to quantmail, quantchat, quantai services in docker-compose.yml pointing to Jaeger OTLP endpoint
Add packages/observability/src/sdk/__tests__/tracing.test.ts and metrics.test.ts with unit tests
acceptance_criteria: initTracing() is a no-op when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is not set
createLogger() injects trace_id into log entries when OTel is active
docker-compose.yml includes jaeger, prometheus, grafana services
